profiles.name: Budget Champion
profiles.tagline: Like an entry-level phone found in most Indian households — simple, reliable, affordable.
profiles.idealFor: Grandparents, first-time users, basic calling and messaging
profiles.realExamples: Similar to entry-level phones like Redmi A-series, Samsung M0x, or Nokia budget phones.

profiles.name: Everyday All-Rounder
profiles.tagline: A balanced phone for school, social apps, and casual gaming — the most common phone type.
profiles.idealFor: Students, everyday multitaskers, light gaming and photography
profiles.realExamples: Similar to popular mid-range phones like Redmi Note series, Samsung Galaxy M series, or Realme Number series.

profiles.name: Gaming Beast
profiles.tagline: High refresh rate display, powerful CPU, and strong cooling — built for competitive mobile gaming.
profiles.idealFor: Gamers who need smooth frame rates and no overheating during long sessions
profiles.realExamples: Similar to gaming phones like Poco X series, iQOO Z/Neo series, or ROG Phone lineups.

profiles.name: Camera Pro
profiles.tagline: High-megapixel main and selfie cameras with AI processing — built for photography lovers.
profiles.idealFor: Content creators, photography enthusiasts, social media users
profiles.realExamples: Similar to camera-focused phones like Google Pixel series, Vivo V series, or OPPO Reno series.

profiles.name: Flagship Ultra
profiles.tagline: Top-tier CPU, huge battery, best display and camera — no compromises.
profiles.idealFor: Power users who want the absolute best experience in every category
profiles.realExamples: Similar to flagship phones like Samsung Galaxy S/Ultra series, iPhone Pro series, or OnePlus flagship series.

profiles.name: Outdoor Explorer
profiles.tagline: Large battery, barometer, and GPS — designed to survive trips into nature.
profiles.idealFor: Hikers, travelers, and outdoor adventurers who need reliability off-grid
profiles.realExamples: Similar to rugged phones like Doogee, Ulefone Armor series, or Cat Phones.
